verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I want to know you Lord, You are a great be God, I'm young a do not know a lot, Come and be my all.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I want to Love you more Giving you my life and all You died for me, you sacrifice I won't forget it all

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I love you Jesus, I grow up serving you I love you Jesus, I grow up knowing you I love you Jesus, my life is save by you I'll never forget, never forget I'll grow up loving you
